title: Need strategy/system help

posts.author: HSP1 (Ben Moss)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a startup company that has been using monday.com for one year. We are a home maintenance company that needs help setting up our boards properly to keep things running smoothly. We have a basic understanding of monday.com but know it could be much more useful to us if we got some help on the front end.
